parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Repeat Logic').first().json;
const s = $('Fetch Intent Session').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  userId: s.userId || s.phoneNumber,
  phoneNumber: s.phoneNumber,
  intentName: s.intentName,
  organizationId: s.organizationId,
  parentOrganizationId: s.parentOrganizationId,
  organizationIntentId: s.organizationIntentId,
  phase: 'collecting',
  currentMainIndex: typeof s.currentMainIndex === 'number' ? s.currentMainIndex : 0,
  sectionName: s.sectionName,
  collectedFields: data.mergedCollectedFields,
  currentItem: '{}',
  completedItems: '[]',
  createdAt: s.createdAt || new Date().toISOString()
} }];

const s = $('Fetch Intent Session').first().json;
return [{ json: { responseType: "__repeat_done__", repeatComplete: true, sectionName: s.sectionName, mergedCollectedFields: $('Prep Complete Insert').first().json.collectedFields } }];
